title: U.S.-China AI feud sees ASML walk tightrope between sales and geopolitics
summary_full: ASML is set to make around a fifth of its 2026 net sales from China, but geopolitical headwinds present a delicate situation.
summary_public: ASML is set to make around a fifth of its 2026 net sales from China, but geopolitical headwinds present a delicate situation.
